title: matelea microphylla
intro: Matelea microphylla, also known as the "Coral Honeysuckle" or "Dogbane Vine," is a flowering vine native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Matelea microphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Matelea microphylla can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
